target.title: fix(template): resolve variable shadowing in export-html template
target.body:
Fix: resolve variable shadowing in export-html template (code quality cleanup)

This is a **code quality improvement** that eliminates variable shadowing in src/auto-reply/reply/export-html/template.js:

1. Rename function parameter 'data' to 'base64Data' in sanitizeImageBase64()
2. Rename local variable 'base64' to 'imgBase64' in renderDataUrlImage()
3. Rename local variable 'leafId' to 'targetLeafId' in tree node click handler

## Context

Note: This file is currently excluded from oxlint coverage (see .oxlintrc.json line 218), so these changes are **preventive code quality improvements** rather than fixes for enforced lint failures. The renamed variables eliminate potential confusion where inner scope variables shadow outer scope names, improving code clarity and maintainability.

## Testing

All existing tests pass (14/14 in vitest.auto-reply.config.ts). The HTML export functionality remains unchanged - only internal variable names were updated.
